mapper.sql: TR_SNO, TR_SEQ, CONT_NO, MEMBER_NO, PT_NO, MEMBER_PT_NO, TR_DT, TR_GB_CD, TR_METHOD_GB_CD, TR_PT, BEF_BAL_PT, AFR_BAL_PT, CONT_BEF_BAL_PT, CONT_AFR_BAL_PT, ORGL_TR_SNO, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_tr_hist_detail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_tr_hist_detail (TR_SNO, TR_SEQ, CONT_NO, MEMBER_NO, PT_NO, MEMBER_PT_NO, TR_DT, TR_GB_CD, TR_METHOD_GB_CD, TR_PT, BEF_BAL_PT, AFR_BAL_PT, CONT_BEF_BAL_PT, CONT_AFR_BAL_PT, ORGL_TR_SNO, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{befBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{afrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contBefBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contAfrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_tr_hist_detail
TR_SNO,
TR_SEQ,
CONT_NO,
MEMBER_NO,
PT_NO,
MEMBER_PT_NO,
TR_DT,
TR_GB_CD,
TR_METHOD_GB_CD,
TR_PT,
BEF_BAL_PT,
AFR_BAL_PT,
CONT_BEF_BAL_PT,
CONT_AFR_BAL_PT,
ORGL_TR_SNO,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{trSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{befBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{afrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contBefBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contAfrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_tr_hist_detail
TR_SNO = #{row.trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_SEQ = #{row.trSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
PT_NO = #{row.ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_PT_NO = #{row.memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TR_GB_CD = #{row.trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{row.trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_PT = #{row.trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BEF_BAL_PT = #{row.befBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
AFR_BAL_PT = #{row.afrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_BEF_BAL_PT = #{row.contBefBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_AFR_BAL_PT = #{row.contAfrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORGL_TR_SNO = #{row.orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_tr_hist_detail set TR_SNO = #{row.trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_SEQ = #{row.trSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PT_NO = #{row.ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_PT_NO = #{row.memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_DT = #{row.trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, TR_GB_CD = #{row.trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{row.trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_PT = #{row.trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BEF_BAL_PT = #{row.befBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, AFR_BAL_PT = #{row.afrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_BEF_BAL_PT = #{row.contBefBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_AFR_BAL_PT = #{row.contAfrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORGL_TR_SNO = #{row.orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_tr_hist_detail
CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
PT_NO = #{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_PT_NO = #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
TR_GB_CD = #{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TR_PT = #{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BEF_BAL_PT = #{befBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
AFR_BAL_PT = #{afrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_BEF_BAL_PT = #{contBefBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_AFR_BAL_PT = #{contAfrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORGL_TR_SNO = #{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where TR_SNO = #{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TR_SEQ = #{trSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_tr_hist_detail set CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PT_NO = #{ptNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_PT_NO = #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TR_DT = #{trDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, TR_GB_CD = #{trGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_METHOD_GB_CD = #{trMethodGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TR_PT = #{trPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BEF_BAL_PT = #{befBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, AFR_BAL_PT = #{afrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_BEF_BAL_PT = #{contBefBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_AFR_BAL_PT = #{contAfrBalPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORGL_TR_SNO = #{orglTrSno,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where TR_SNO = #{trSno,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TR_SEQ = #{trSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}
